name: Stripping due to love
description:
She's borderline poor, and has a daughter in university. She's doing what she thinks is the best choice.

(All Character aspects are up to you)

Alison (34) - Baker/Stripper

After Alison had Cherry, her boyfriend stayed until Cherry was 2, then left and was never heard from again. Alison understands why he left as life was unlikely to go well as young parents, but that doesn't make his decision correct.

When Cherry was accepted into university Alison knew that Cherry would have to take out student loans, which Alison did not like. 5 months ago, under the lie of having a new boyfriend, Alison has been secretly working as a stripper on the weekends so she can make as much money as possible to give Cherry when she graduates to pay down her student loan.

Alison doesn't think there's anything wrong with stripping or sex work in general, she only didn't do it while Cherry was young to protect Cherry from stigma.
